reference: I had an acute kidney infection on my right side and was hospitalized for six days. I was released from the hospital ten days ago and have been taking Augmentin since then. I keep getting a tingling feeling in my left arm and my left hand seems to go numb a little, especially my pinkie. Could this be related to my kidney issue?
